trickyParts: The KV fallback in Get() already existed before issue #367 was filed — the described bug was never exploitable. This PR adds regression test coverage to prevent future removal of the fallback, plus a doc comment explaining its significance.

Cross-family review identified a theoretical stale-cache race: Get() KV fallback can repopulate cache with data that watch() has already superseded. This is a pre-existing design property of the cache layer, not introduced by this change. Low practical risk since watch() runs continuously and eventually overwrites.
deviations: Issue described a code fix needed in Get() — found that the fix already existed. Changed scope to test-only PR with doc comment instead of code change.
openQuestions: Cross-family review noted the stale-cache race in Get() as a theoretical concern — may warrant a separate issue if observed in production.
